comment.body: I use 1m TF but I'm also running 2160p monitors..   get the SPX RTH day spread on the time axis  leave a bit of room on either side.   paste OD image in TV and its a fixed aspect for resizing so u have to line that up first.  after that get the rough range on price axis.  u can move your cursor on the photo so say 5800 and 4pm and click the photo that way you can line up close and price with your cross hair

comment.body: I don’t know but I was looking at market internals and it seemed to me they were leaning heavily on the market at the end. I often find that this is about after hours SPY trades, if the volume is huge and it is delayed and you get prints all thru the day tomorrow it will be a big inflexion point.
